title: Inspect Operator Station During Daily Preventive Maintenance
summary: Perform the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection for the operator station by checking for controller damage, verifying stacklights are operational, and confirming the chute is free of debris including stuck labels.
when_to_use: Use during the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection scope for the OptiSweep operator station.
not_for: Do not use this runbook for repair or corrective maintenance actions because the source provides inspection checks only.
Do not use this runbook for P40 (V2.0) robot maintenance; the source directs users to the P40A (V2.0) user manual, Document version V1.1 (20231206).
Do not use this runbook for tipper maintenance; the source directs users to contact Lifecycle Performance Services (LPS) at 888-444-4647.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the documented daily preventive maintenance inspection checks for the operator station using the source-listed inspection items.

safety_notes: This source-supported procedure is limited to visual/functional inspection checks only.
Do not invent repair, recovery, or adjustment actions when an inspection item fails.
For tipper maintenance, contact Lifecycle Performance Services (LPS) at 888-444-4647.
For P40 (V2.0) robot maintenance, reference the P40A (V2.0) user manual, Document version V1.1 (20231206).
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to the operator station
Visual access to the controller, stacklights, and chute

access_required: Physical access to the operator station
system_preconditions: Operator station is available for daily preventive maintenance inspection.
external_references: P40A (V2.0) user manual, Document version V1.1 (20231206) for P40 (V2.0) robot maintenance.
Lifecycle Performance Services (LPS) at 888-444-4647 for tipper maintenance.

visual_references.description: Reference photo of the operator station showing the chute and stacklight locations.

steps.title: Inspect the controller for damage
steps.purpose: Verify that the operator station controller does not show visible damage during daily preventive maintenance.
steps.instruction: Go to the operator station and inspect the controller for damage.
steps.expected_result: No damage is observed on the controller.
steps.healthy_condition: The controller appears intact with no visible damage noted during inspection.
steps.failure_condition: Any visible controller damage is observed.

actions.label: Inspect controller
actions.exact_action: Inspect the operator station for the following: Damage to the controller.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to orient to the operator station hardware while locating the inspection area.

stop_or_escalate_if: Visible damage is found on the controller.
Corrective maintenance is required but not provided by this source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect the operator station for the following: Damage to the controller.
Figure 3-1 appears on page 24 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_3_2_operator_station.

steps.title: Check that stacklights are operational
steps.purpose: Verify that the operator station stacklights are operational as required by the daily preventive maintenance inspection.
steps.instruction: Check that the operator station stacklights are operational.
steps.healthy_condition: The stacklights are operational during the inspection.

actions.label: Check stacklights
actions.exact_action: Inspect the operator station for the following: Stacklights are operational.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to identify the stacklights mounted on the top of the frame on either side of the chute.

stop_or_escalate_if: Corrective maintenance is required but not provided by this source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect the operator station for the following: Stacklights are operational.
Figure 3-1 appears on page 24 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_3_2_operator_station.

steps.title: Inspect the chute for debris
steps.purpose: Verify that the chute is clear of debris, including stuck labels, during daily preventive maintenance.
steps.instruction: Inspect the chute and verify it is free of debris, including stuck labels.
steps.expected_result: The chute is free of debris and no stuck labels are present.
steps.healthy_condition: The chute is clear and free of debris such as stuck labels.
steps.failure_condition: Debris or stuck labels are present in the chute.

actions.label: Inspect chute
actions.exact_action: Inspect the operator station for the following: Chute is free of debris (e.g., stuck labels).

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Use the operator station reference image to identify the chute location for inspection.

stop_or_escalate_if: Debris or stuck labels are found in the chute and corrective action is not defined by this source.
Additional maintenance beyond inspection is required.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Inspect the operator station for the following: Chute is free of debris (e.g., stuck labels).
Figure 3-1 appears on page 24 in section optisweep_operation_and_maintenance_manual_final_1_3_2_operator_station.

success_criteria: No visible damage is found on the controller.
The operator station stacklights are operational.
The chute is free of debris, including stuck labels.
healthy_conditions: Chute is clear of debris and stuck labels.
failure_conditions: Debris or stuck labels are present in the chute.
A failed inspection item requires corrective action not provided in this source.
escalation_guidance: If maintenance is needed for the tipper, contact Lifecycle Performance Services (LPS) at 888-444-4647.
For maintenance related to the P40 (V2.0) robots, reference the P40A (V2.0) user manual, Document version V1.1 (20231206).
If an inspection item fails, stop at inspection findings and seek SME or maintenance guidance because the source does not provide corrective actions.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall operator station layout, including chute and stacklight locations, to support physical inspection.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: Inspect the operator station for the following: Damage to the controller. Stacklights are operational. Chute is free of debris (e.g., stuck labels).

missing_details: The source section in this packet does not provide corrective actions for failed inspection items.
The source does not specify whether production stop is required for this inspection.
The source does not specify whether LOTO is required for this inspection.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not explicitly define a supporting role or approval/review requirement.
No source-supported commands are provided for this procedure.
No operator-station-specific inspection image on page 97 is included in the packet; Figure 3-1 is used only as a general orientation reference.
